title: Non-flags enums should not be marked with FlagsAttribute
description: Non-flags enums should not be marked with "FlagsAttribute"Analyze your codeintentionality-logicalmaintainabilityCode SmellWhy is this an issue?This rule raises an issue when an externally visible enumeration is marked withFlagsAttributeand one, or more, of its values is not a power of 2 or a combination of the other defined values.Noncompliant code exampleusing System; namespace MyLibrary { [Flags] public enum Color // Noncompliant, Orange is neither a power of two, nor a combination of any of the defined values { None = 0, Red = 1, Orange = 3, Yellow = 4 } }Compliant solutionusing System; namespace MyLibrary { public enum Color // Compliant - no FlagsAttribute { None = 0, Red = 1, Orange = 3, Yellow = 4 } [Flags] public enum Days { None = 0, Monday = 1, Tuesday = 2, Wednesday = 4, Thursda
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

noncompliant:
[Flags]
public enum Color  // Noncompliant - Orange (3) is not a power of 2
{
    None = 0,
    Red = 1,
    Orange = 3,  // Not a power of 2, not a combination of other values
    Yellow = 4
}

[Flags]
public enum Status  // Noncompliant - Invalid values
{
    Inactive = 0,
    Active = 1,
    Pending = 3,  // Should be 2
    Completed = 5  // Should be 4
}
compliant:
public enum Color  // Compliant - removed [Flags] attribute
{
    None = 0,
    Red = 1,
    Orange = 3,
    Yellow = 4
}

[Flags]
public enum Permissions  // Compliant - all values are powers of 2
{
    None = 0,
    Read = 1,
    Write = 2,
    Execute = 4,
    ReadWrite = Read | Write  // Combination of other values is OK
}

logic.triggering_conditions: CompilationUnit nodes (source files) containing enums with [Flags] attribute having non-power-of-2 values (3, 5, 9, etc.)
logic.reasoning: Detects enums marked with [Flags] attribute that contain values not following power-of-2 pattern. Uses regex to identify [Flags] followed by enum declarations with values that are invalid (3, 5, 9, etc.). Excludes bitwise OR combinations and valid combination values which are acceptable for flags enums. Targets CompilationUnit (root) nodes to access the full source code. Removed comment exclusion to avoid false negatives.

should_trigger: [Flags] public enum Color { None = 0, Red = 1, Orange = 3, Yellow = 4 }
[Flags] public enum Status { Inactive = 0, Active = 1, Pending = 3 }
[Flags] public enum Access { None = 0, Read = 1, Write = 2, Delete = 5 }
should_not_trigger: public enum Color { None = 0, Red = 1, Orange = 3, Yellow = 4 }
[Flags] public enum Permissions { None = 0, Read = 1, Write = 2, Execute = 4 }
[Flags] public enum Access { None = 0, Read = 1, Write = 2, ReadWrite = Read | Write }
